testi.q1: In three weeks we aligned messaging, website, and campaigns. Appointment volume increased, and for the first time everything was measured clearly.
testi.q2: We moved from ‘pretty ads’ to ads that sell. ROAS improved and organic traffic grew with intent-driven content.
testi.q3: Lead quality went up. The structure made the difference: creative, targeting, and optimization with discipline.
testi.q4: They redesigned our landing and booking flow. Conversions improved and the brand looks more premium.
testi.q5: The best part was clarity: actionable reporting and fast decisions. We stopped spending blindly.
testi.q6: They understand performance and brand. Our digital presence now feels trustworthy—and that shows in revenue.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Clear answers before you invest.
faq.q1: How long until we see results?
faq.a1: It depends on the channel. Ads can show signals in days; SEO usually takes weeks. We define metrics and expectations by phase.
faq.q2: What exactly is included in each plan?
faq.a2: Each plan has specific deliverables. Before kickoff, we confirm scope, channels, and goals to avoid ambiguity.
faq.a3: Yes. Payments are processed by PayPal under their security standards. This site does not store card data.
faq.q4: Do you work with small businesses or only large companies?
faq.a4: Both. What matters is ROI potential and clear objectives.
faq.a5: You’ll get a confirmation message and we’ll schedule kickoff. We also request access and required assets.
faq.q6: Can I cancel or change plans?
faq.a6: Yes. No long-term contract. You can adjust based on business stage and needs.
faq.q7: Can I purchase individual services without a package?
faq.a7: Yes. We can quote specific projects (landing page, SEO audit, one-off campaigns) upon request.
faq.q8: Do you have experience in my industry?
faq.a8: Most likely. We’ve worked with healthcare, retail, ecommerce, restaurants, professional services, and more. We adapt the system to your context.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: We explain what information we process, why we process it, how we protect it, and what choices you have.
privacy.s1.title: Information we collect
privacy.s1.body: We may process the information you share by email or contact forms (name, email, and project details). Basic technical browser data may also be generated to keep the interface working properly.
privacy.s2.title: PayPal payments
privacy.s2.body: Payments are processed through PayPal. This site does not store card numbers or financial credentials. Payment information is handled directly by PayPal under its own privacy and security policies.
privacy.s3.title: Cookies and analytics
privacy.s3.body: We use local storage and equivalent technical mechanisms to remember preferences such as language or visual theme. If analytics is enabled, it is used to improve performance and user experience while minimizing unnecessary data collection.
privacy.s4.title: Contact and rights
privacy.s4.body: You may request access, correction, or deletion of information you have shared through our contact channels by emailing contact_us@fengdigitalservices.com. You may also request clarification about data use, retention, and safeguards.
terms.title: User Agreement
terms.subtitle: This agreement sets the rules for using this website and the general conditions for hiring FDS services.
terms.s1.title: Acceptance of terms
terms.s1.body: By browsing this website or purchasing a service, you accept these terms. If you do not agree with any part, you must not use the website or proceed with service purchases.
terms.s2.title: Scope of services
terms.s2.body: FDS provides digital marketing, design, content, SEO, paid media, and consulting services. The exact scope, deliverables, and timelines are confirmed with each client before execution starts.
terms.s3.title: Payments, cancellations, and plan changes
terms.s3.body: Payments are processed through PayPal. Cancellation, rescheduling, and plan-change conditions are coordinated in writing based on service status and work already performed.
terms.s4.title: Permitted website use
terms.s4.body: You may not use this website for unlawful, fraudulent, or harmful activities affecting security, availability, or reputation. Copying or reusing website content without prior authorization is also prohibited.
terms.s5.title: Intellectual property and liability
terms.s5.body: Website content, design, and materials belong to FDS or their lawful owners. FDS makes reasonable efforts to keep information updated but does not guarantee uninterrupted availability or total absence of errors at all times.
terms.s6.title: Legal contact and updates
terms.s6.body: We may update this User Agreement when needed due to operational or legal changes. For legal or commercial questions, contact contact_us@fengdigitalservices.com.
